response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches 'Life Will Change' (Persona 5) performed by Ouro Kronii and 'X-encounter' (Maon Kurosaki) performed by IRyS. Used on-screen titles and scene metadata to verify the correct lyrics for this medley. Instrumental breaks and long dance segments have been left without subtitles as per the 'Ghost Subtitles' rule. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, including precise splitting for pauses and elongated syllables.

subtitles.original: 飛べない ここからは
subtitles.english: I can't fly from here

subtitles.original: 横顔 眺めてるだけじゃ
subtitles.english: Just by staring at your profile

subtitles.original: 無力さを 嘆いても
subtitles.english: Even if I lament my helplessness

subtitles.original: この背を 誰も押さない
subtitles.english: No one will push my back

subtitles.original: Go out 飛び方を 忘れていた
subtitles.english: Go out, I had forgotten how to fly

subtitles.original: 鳥たちの 嘆きのボイス
subtitles.english: The lamenting voices of birds

subtitles.original: 凍てつく 無機質な
subtitles.english: In the freezing, inorganic

subtitles.original: 世界に 何を望むの?
subtitles.english: What do you desire from this world?

subtitles.original: そうだね 確実な
subtitles.english: That's right, a certain

subtitles.original: 希望が もう僕の中に
subtitles.english: Hope is already within me

subtitles.original: Go out 何ができるかなんて
subtitles.english: Go out, what I can do

subtitles.original: もう やってみなきゃわからない
subtitles.english: I won't know until I try

subtitles.original: 走り出した 始まりへ
subtitles.english: I started running towards the beginning

subtitles.original: きっと 生まれる前から 決まっていた
subtitles.english: It must have been decided since before I was born

subtitles.original: 羽を揺らし 強く地面を蹴って
subtitles.english: Shaking my wings, kicking the ground hard

subtitles.original: 君の元へ はばたこう Raven
subtitles.english: I'll flap my wings towards you, Raven

subtitles.original: Spiky folding up 螺旋のルートの中で会う
subtitles.english: Spiky folding up, meeting within the spiral route

subtitles.original: この場所でもう 止められない
subtitles.english: I can't be stopped here anymore

subtitles.original: カルマ 回した手で
subtitles.english: With my hands that turned karma

subtitles.original: 僕にできることが どんなにわずかでも
subtitles.english: No matter how little I can do

subtitles.original: その身体に背負うもの その痛み 分け合える日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day I can share the things you carry and that pain

subtitles.original: 君のそばにいる
subtitles.english: I'll be by your side
